buttons.primary: bg-[#D4F0A5] text-slate-900 border-2 border-slate-900 hover:bg-[#C2E38D] transition-all rounded-xl px-6 py-3 font-bold hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(15,23,42,1)] active:translate-y-0 active:shadow-none
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-slate-900 border-2 border-slate-900 hover:bg-slate-50 transition-all rounded-xl px-6 py-3 font-bold hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(15,23,42,1)] active:translate-y-0 active:shadow-none
buttons.danger: bg-[#FFA8A8] text-slate-900 border-2 border-slate-900 hover:bg-[#FF9494] transition-all rounded-xl px-6 py-3 font-bold hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(15,23,42,1)] active:translate-y-0 active:shadow-none

cards.default: bg-white border-2 border-slate-900 rounded-xl p-6 md:p-8 shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(15,23,42,1)]

inputs.default: bg-white border-2 border-slate-900 rounded-xl px-4 py-3 font-medium text-slate-900 focus:ring-0 focus:outline-none focus:border-indigo-500 focus:shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(99,102,241,1)] transition-all
inputs.select: bg-white border-2 border-slate-900 rounded-xl px-4 py-3 font-medium text-slate-900 cursor-pointer

components.sidebar: bg-white border-l-2 border-slate-900 h-screen overflow-y-auto p-6 flex flex-col gap-4
components.header: bg-white border-b-2 border-slate-900 py-4 px-6 md:px-8 flex justify-between items-center sticky top-0 z-50

badges.income: bg-[#D4F0A5] border-2 border-slate-900 text-slate-900 px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-bold uppercase
badges.expense: bg-[#FFA8A8] border-2 border-slate-900 text-slate-900 px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-bold uppercase

layout.description: Grid layout. Main area for data entry and dashboard. Right sidebar for daily records (receipt tape style). Top header for Total Sold.
layout.right_sidebar: w-full md:w-80 lg:w-96 hidden md:flex border-l-2 border-slate-900 bg-white shadow-[-4px_0px_0px_0px_rgba(15,23,42,0.05)] flex-col

login_background.description: Minimalist stacked geometric shapes on soft pink background, used for the login/auth screen split view.

accessibility.contrast: All text passes APCA/WCAG AA. Neo-brutalist borders ensure distinct boundaries for interactive elements.
accessibility.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST use data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='sales-submit-btn', data-testid='daily-total-display').

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a robust POS layout. Keep the left/center area for operations (forms, dashboard) and the right side permanently showing the day's timeline/receipts.
Use Shadcn UI components but heavily override them with the neo-brutalist classes (borders, harsh shadows, rounded-xl).
For the daily total in the top right, make it massive. 'text-4xl sm:text-5xl font-black' using JetBrains Mono or Cabinet Grotesk.
Do not use transparent headers. The top bar should have a solid bg and a 2px bottom border.
Forms should be quick. Autocomplete inputs for 'Producto' and 'Cliente' are critical for operator speed.
Implement the 'Método de pago' as large segmented control buttons or a clear Shadcn Select.
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing.
For charts, use Recharts with matching brand colors (D4F0A5 for income, FFA8A8 for expenses) and strict borders.
